case_title: CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. VS. UNITED TRUCKING EXPRESS LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 100212677) TO PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 100223687) AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED TRUCKING EXPRESS LLC
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 100225890) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED TRUCKING EXPRESS LLC
REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $601.10 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 210065680) AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED TRUCKING EXPRESS LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210065680) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 100212677) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100220673), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. SERVED NOV-22-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED TRUCKING EXPRESS LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100212677) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED TRUCKING EXPRESS LLC DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-11-2024
DECLARATION OF JOSEPH JYOO RE: METHOD OF CALCULATING INTEREST (TRANSACTION ID # 210065680) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.
DECLARATION OF BENJAMIN SEEMAN PURSUANT TO C.C.P. SECTION 585 (TRANSACTION ID # 210065680) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.
DECLARATION RE ATTORNEY'S FEES PURSUANT CIVIL CODE SECTION 1717 (TRANSACTION ID # 210065680) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UNITED TRUCKING EXPRESS LLC $22,559.38 PRINCIPAL, $2,600.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $3,836.40 INTEREST, $601.10 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $29,596.88, SEE SCANNED DOC
